message:
test(attestation): add Debug trait coverage tests for fallback state, health, and action tier enums

Adds three targeted tests verifying that Debug implementations on
AttestationFallbackState, AttestationHealth, and ActionTier produce
non-empty output for all variants, ensuring derive(Debug) coverage
and preventing silent regressions if enum variants are renamed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
